question: What are your opening hours?
answer: We are open Monday to Friday 08:00 to 18:00 and Saturday 09:00 to 13:00. We are closed on Sundays and public holidays.

question: What areas do you cover?
answer: We cover Example Town and everywhere within roughly 40 km of it. Not sure if that includes you? Send us your postcode and we will confirm.

question: How do I get a quote?
answer: Use the contact form on our website or email hello@example.com with a short description of the job. We reply with a fixed quote within one working day.

question: What payment methods do you accept?
answer: We accept all major debit and credit cards, bank transfer and Apple Pay. Payment is due within 14 days of the invoice date.

question: Do you offer emergency call-outs?
answer: Yes. Emergency call-outs are available 24/7 and carry a fixed surcharge on top of our standard rates. Call the emergency line listed on your booking confirmation.

question: How quickly can you schedule a visit?
answer: Routine visits are usually scheduled within three working days. You will get a confirmation email with the date and an arrival window.

question: What is your cancellation policy?
answer: You can cancel or reschedule free of charge up to 24 hours before the appointment. Later cancellations are charged at 50% of the booked rate.

question: Are your engineers certified?
answer: Yes. Every engineer is fully certified, insured and DBS-checked, and we re-certify annually.

question: Do you provide a warranty on your work?
answer: All work comes with a 12-month parts and labour warranty. If anything we fixed fails within that period, we return and put it right at no cost.

question: How can I track my appointment?
answer: After booking you receive a confirmation email with a tracking link, plus a reminder the day before and a message when the engineer is on the way.
